response.justification: Strong generalist software engineer with 15+ years of experience and recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling at re:cinq, which aligns with the role's focus on agentic workflows. However, the resume lacks demonstrated depth in production GenAI delivery, RAG architectures, vector databases, and major cloud platforms beyond AWS CDK at Optilyz. The candidate's AI experience appears recent (under a year) and the required 8+ years of AI-driven solution development is not substantiated.
strengths: Recent hands-on work with MCP code generators and agentic workflow frameworks at re:cinq
Deep polyglot engineering background (TypeScript, Node.js, Python-adjacent stacks) with strong testing/TDD discipline
Proven customer-facing and mentorship track record via workshops, talks, and course creation
concerns: No demonstrated 8+ years building production AI systems — AI exposure appears limited to ~1 year
No explicit RAG, vector database, or LLM evaluation/observability experience listed
Limited multi-cloud depth (AWS CDK mentioned; no GCP/Azure or large-scale cloud AI architecture)

key_factors.factor: Insufficient AI production tenure vs. 8+ year requirement
Recent MCP and agentic workflow work at re:cinq
